generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that 80% of Americans are completely unprepared for a national emergency? While our neighbors are stockpiling supplies and training for disasters, bureaucrats are wasting billions on ineffective programs. It's our duty to demand better civil defense preparedness - our families' safety depends on it. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
